name: Nasha Town
title: Nasha Town
desc: This town sits like a ship run aground on the world's edge — a place where drifters gather to scavenge fragments of elysium from the wreckage of history and fabricated pasts.

skills.desc:
End Phase: Attach Empowerment to 2 random cards in your Hand with a Current Elemental Dice Cost of 2 or more.
Usage(s): 2
When this card is discarded: If this card has 0 Usages, deal 2 Physical DMG.
